response.justification: James has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS)
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
Lacks documented leadership in customer-facing technical discovery or enterprise AI deployment
Education shows only a BS; no advanced degree or AI-specific academic background
